GemSaviourSwordPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue: Any paying symbol that appears on any reel will pay out.
GemSaviourSwordPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyCatRespinFeature1: 1 or more Cat symbols appearing on reel 2, 3 and/or 4 will trigger the Cat Respin Feature.
GemSaviourSwordPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyCatRespinFeature2: All of the Cat symbols on the reels will respin to reveal a randomly selected symbol (excluding Spade symbol, Heart symbol, Club symbol and Diamond symbol). Wins will then be paid.
GemSaviourSwordPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBonusWheelFeature1: 3 Sword symbols appearing on reels 2, 3 and 4 will trigger the Bonus Wheel Feature.
GemSaviourSwordPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBonusWheelFeature2: Swipe on the Bonus Wheel to spin the Bonus Wheel.
GemSaviourSwordPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBonusWheelFeature3: If the Bonus Wheel stops and the indicator shows only a value with "x" in front of it, a prize that equals to the bet amount multiplies with the value shown in the indicator will be awarded.
GemSaviourSwordPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBonusWheelFeature4: If the Bonus Wheel stops and the indicator shows a value with "x" in front of it and two arrows around the value, a Bonus Respin with the multiplier of the value shown in the indicator will be awarded.
GemSaviourSwordPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBonusWheelFeature5: During the Bonus Respin, each reel will spin to reveal a symbol.
GemSaviourSwordPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBonusWheelFeature6: If there are Spade symbols, Heart symbols, Club symbols or Diamond symbols appearing on 1 or more reels, those reels will respin again.
GemSaviourSwordPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyBonusWheelFeature7: When all of the reels have a symbol other than Spade symbol, Heart symbol, Club symbol or Diamond symbol, the Bonus Respin ends and wins multiplied by the value shown in the Bonus Wheel indicator are then paid.

GemSaviourSwordRules.GeneralRules1: Gem Saviour Sword is a 5-reel, 1-row video slot featuring Bonus Wheel Feature with cash prizes and Bonus Respin.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 10 base bet (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

GemSaviourSwordRules.GeneralRules3: Payouts are made according to the "Paytable".
GemSaviourSwordRules.GeneralRules4: A paying symbol win in cash is equal to the value shown in the "Paytable" multiplied by the bet size and bet level.
GemSaviourSwordRules.GeneralRules5: Bonus Wheel Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Bonus Wheel Feature.
GemSaviourSwordRules.BodyBonusWheelFeature: Cat symbols and Sword symbols will not appear during Bonus Respin.
